creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
lli(1) is referenced in binmiscctl(8). It looks like there's no lli manpage and utility in the base system. It is called lli60 instead. At least on FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT r333659.

Should we modify some Makefiles to link lli(1) to lli60(1)? 

I believe we could handle llc in a similar way.
